stats.fact: Google ADK is available in Python, TypeScript, Go, and Java, covering the most popular developer languages
ADK TypeScript SWE-1.5 scores 40.08% on SWE-Bench, matching Claude Sonnet accuracy at 14x the speed
ADK supports Gemini 3 Pro and Gemini 3 Flash, the latest Google AI models, with full feature support including Code Execution, Google Search, and Context caching
85% of developers regularly use AI tools for coding in 2026, driving demand for structured agent frameworks like ADK
Google ADK supports multi-agent architectures natively, enabling agent-to-agent delegation and composition
